meaning: v.撒(某物)于(某物之表面),洒,喷撒
examples: Sprinkle onion and cheese in the pie plate.
You can sprinkle shallots and tomatoes on the surface as you like.
Sprinkle with cinnamon if desired and top with a thinly sliced apple.
What a great way to help sprinkle the Silicon Valley magic on our startup communities everywhere!
But is it true that all colleges sprinkle their graduates with the same magic dust?
